detail: final fits use Sample-I runs only; held-out Sample-II run list is disjoint
features are same-pulse waveform/amplitude/template/pretrigger/stave/run-family indicators; no event id, run number, event order, other-stave time, or target residual
shuffled Sample-I target should not match the true HGB correction on Sample II
run-family atom alone should not reproduce the HGB correction
stave label alone should not reproduce the full HGB correction
HGB without stave labels must still beat analytic_timewalk to reject a stave shortcut
support-excluded HGB uses waveform, amplitude, and generic shape only; its CI win is required for a robust non-support claim
upper endpoint of paired run-bootstrap delta vs analytic_timewalk must be below zero
each feature-family removal must retain a CI win over analytic_timewalk to claim robust survival
